name: 双均线 (5/20)
description: MA5 上穿 MA20 买入, 下穿卖出。经典趋势策略。
code:
# 双均线 (5/20)
# MA5 上穿 MA20 买入, 下穿卖出
short = params.get('short', 5)
long = params.get('long', 20)
ma_short = close.rolling(short).mean()
ma_long = close.rolling(long).mean()
buy = ma_short > ma_long
sell = ma_short < ma_long

name: 双均线 (10/30)
code:
# 双均线 (10/30)
short = params.get('short', 10)
long = params.get('long', 30)
ma_short = close.rolling(short).mean()
ma_long = close.rolling(long).mean()
buy = ma_short > ma_long
sell = ma_short < ma_long

name: 海龟突破 (20日)
description: 突破 20 日高点买入, 跌破 10 日低点卖出。理查德·丹尼斯经典策略。
code:
# 海龟突破
entry_period = params.get('entry', 20)
exit_period = params.get('exit', 10)
# 突破昨日 20 日高点买入
high_entry = high.rolling(entry_period).max().shift(1)
low_exit = low.rolling(exit_period).min().shift(1)
buy = close > high_entry
sell = close < low_exit

name: 布林带回归 (20日, 2σ)
description: 触及下轨买入, 触及上轨卖出。均值回归思路。
code:
# 布林带回归
period = params.get('period', 20)
std_n = params.get('std', 2)
mid = close.rolling(period).mean()
sigma = close.rolling(period).std()
upper = mid + std_n * sigma
lower = mid - std_n * sigma
buy = close < lower
sell = close > upper

name: RSI 反转 (14日)
description: RSI<30 买入, RSI>70 卖出。经典超买超卖指标。
code:
# RSI 反转
period = params.get('period', 14)
buy_th = params.get('buy', 30)
sell_th = params.get('sell', 70)
delta = close.diff()
gain = delta.where(delta > 0, 0).rolling(period).mean()
loss = (-delta.where(delta < 0, 0)).rolling(period).mean()
rs = gain / (loss + 1e-9)
rsi = 100 - 100 / (1 + rs)
buy = rsi < buy_th
sell = rsi > sell_th
